queries.feature_definition: Credit history: all previous credits at this bank paid back duly.
queries.question: Empirical analysis of the relationship between a credit history of all previous credits paid back duly and increased credit default probability.

queries.feature_definition: Savings account status: savings below 100 DM.
queries.question: Investigation into the role of savings account balances below 100 DM as a determinant of decreased credit risk.

queries.feature_definition: Checking account status: balance below 0 DM.
queries.question: Statistical impact of checking account balances below zero on elevated credit default probability.
